sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n845" key="a)gria/nqrwpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγρι-άνθρωπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n845.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wild man, savage</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
